content.en:
"To intervene in the formation of the Immeasurable Feather Armor Seed Imprint, six resource materials are required. "

Ye Tian now only had one material in his hand, and that was the Immeasurable Blood Gold Stone.

In addition to the immeasurable blood gold stone, five materials are also needed: Dragon Scale Saint Xuanjing, Thousand Dao Gold Liquid, Ancient Stygian Wood, Divine Blood Breath Soil, and Tricky Crystal Heart.

And among these five materials, Ye Tian had only heard of the Divine Blood Breath and the Ancient Shadow Wood, and had never heard of the other materials, let alone where to get them.

There is no doubt that even in a force like the Xuanqi Pavilion, it is estimated that it will be difficult to obtain these materials.

"I have to contact the Blood Ancestor, this guy is well-informed, and following the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor, he may know the information of these materials!"

So, Ye Tian immediately contacted the Blood Ancestor.

......

Soon, Ye Tian met with the Bloody Ancestor.

"Endless Ancestor!"

The Blood Ancestor was quite polite, but he looked at Ye Tian carefully and was immediately stunned.

"Endless Great Ancestor, I'm afraid you've already completed four or five full-body tempering, right?"

The Blood Ancestor asked.

Ye Tian didn't hide it, and said it truthfully: "I have already completed five full-body tempering!"

The Blood Ancestor was very aware of the difficulty of completing a full-body tempering of the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, even if there was a large amount of immeasurable blood stones, it was not enough, and there must be more precious treasures.

In the Xuanqi Realm, such treasures are very rare, and even almost extinct.

Well, there is only one possibility.

"Endless Great Ancestor, didn't you get a benefit from the Silver Heng Heavenly Ancestor?" said the Bloody Great Ancestor in surprise.

Ye Tian nodded slightly: "Yes!"

The Blood Ancestor was envious, he had only only broken through to the fourth stage of the high-level immeasurable lifeform, but it was still far from the second full-body refinement, if he could also obtain that kind of benefit, how good it would be!

At this time, Ye Tian asked: "Blood Ancestor, you have once followed the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor and have a wide range of knowledge, can you know the three materials of Dragon Scale Saint Xuanjing, Thousand Dao Golden Liquid, and Deteriorating Crystal Heart?"

"Dragon Scale Saint Xuanjing, Thousand Dao Gold Liquid, Tricky Crystal Heart, this is an incomparably rare treasure!"

The Blood Ancestor said.

"Can you tell us about these three materials and how they can be obtained?"

Ye Tian continued to ask for advice.

The Blood Ancestor recalled for a moment, and then said: "The material of the Dragon Scale Saint Xuanjing does not exist in the Xuanqi Realm, it is a kind of crystal on the body of the Dragon Scale Saint Beetle in the ruins of the Infinite Realm, which is also called the Dragon Scale Saint Xuanjing! The weakest Dragon Scale Saint Armor Stone is comparable to the top fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and there are even existences comparable to the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and their number is relatively rare, so it is not easy to obtain a Dragon Scale Saint Xuanjing. "

"As for the Thousand Dao Gold Liquid, it can be used to improve the immeasurable body, and it can also repair the damage of the foundation, and its value is very high. This kind of treasure is needed by the high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the fifth stage. As for where you can get this treasure, I don't know very well. However, the Outer Realm Alliance has a second-level resource, Thousand Dao Silver Liquid, and Thousand Dao Silver Liquid and Thousand Dao Gold Liquid are the same kind of treasures, but the grade is much lower. The Out-of-Bounds Alliance has a thousand silver liquids, and perhaps a thousand gold liquids. "

"And the heart of the deceitful crystal, there is only one place, and that is the deceitful clan of the deceitful crystal realm. This clan is very powerful, and has many fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform level existences, if you want to enter the Crystal Realm to kill the members of the Crystal Clan, and seize the heart of the Crystal in their bodies, without the strength of the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, it is almost looking for death!"

After the Raccoon Blood Ancestor said this, Ye Tian had enough understanding of these three materials.

It's much easier to know where to get them, but if you can get them, you'll have to try them.

"Let's go to the Outside Alliance to cooperate first, and see if we can get some Thousand Dao Silver Liquid!"

Ye Tian was going to use a thousand ways of silver liquid to fuse into a thousand ways of gold liquid, which should be doable.

If it is successful, then there will be no shortage of thousands of gold liquids.

......

Although the Outside Alliance is a force outside the Genki Territory, it also has territory and strongholds in the Genki Territory.

this day.

Ye Tian came to one of the main strongholds of the Outer Realm Alliance, the Jingling Mountain Branch.

According to Ye Tian's understanding, the Jingling Mountain Branch was the most important stronghold of the Outside Alliance, no less than the headquarters of some top powers.

There is a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform here, and there are many third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

When Ye Tian came here, the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform also sensed it.

Airplanes!!!!

A burly man appeared in front of Ye Tian, he was the high-level immeasurable lifeform of the fourth stage of the Outer Alliance, the Great Ancestor of Camel Mountain!

"I've seen the Camel Mountain Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said politely.

When the Camel Mountain Ancestor saw Ye Tian, he naturally recognized it.

However, he was shocked by Ye Tian's cultivation.

"Five full-body tempering!"

He knew that it hadn't been long since Ye Tiancai had broken through to the fourth stage of high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and it stood to reason that it was still the first full-body refinement, no matter how rebellious the cultivation speed was, there was no shortage of resources, and it was inconceivable to be able to complete the second full-body refinement.

As a result, Ye Tian had already completed five full-body tempering, and such a cultivation speed simply made him unbelievable!

Even the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform with the fastest cultivation speed in the Outer Alliance could not have such a cultivation speed!

The Great Ancestor of Camel Mountain became extremely respectful at this moment.

Ye Tian, who had just broken through before, could easily kill the Great Ancestor of Tongshan, and now that he had completed five full-body tempering, his strength was afraid that he was invincible among the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

For such a demon ancestor, even if it is an out-of-bounds alliance, he doesn't want to offend!

"I've seen the Endless Great Ancestor!"

The Camel Mountain Ancestor said extremely respectfully.

Immediately, he asked again, "What is the matter with the Endless Great Ancestor visiting our Outer Realm Alliance?"

He was a little worried that Ye Tian was here to find trouble, then he would definitely not be able to stop it, he would definitely be killed in an instant!

At this time, Ye Tian said: "Camel Mountain Great Ancestor, I want to talk about a cooperative deal with the Outside Alliance. "

"Cooperative deals?"

The Great Ancestor of Camel Mountain was a little puzzled, and he didn't know what Ye Tian wanted to cooperate in trading?

"I have a batch of immeasurable blood gold stones in my hands, I don't know if the Outside Alliance is interested, I want to trade some Thousand Dao Silver Liquid. "

Ye Tian believed that the Outside Alliance should be interested.

After all, such a transaction is only good for the out-of-bounds alliance, and there is no harm.
